        KeYParser(ParserMode mode, TokenStream lexer) 
        KeYParser(ParserMode mode, TokenStream lexer, JavaReader jr, Services services, NamespaceSet nss, AbbrevMap scm)
      Used to construct Term parser - for first-order terms and formulae.
        KeYParser(ParserMode mode, TokenStream lexer, ParserConfig schemaConfig, ParserConfig normalConfig, HashMap taclet2Builder, ImmutableList<Taclet> taclets)

        KeYParser(ParserMode mode, TokenStream lexer, SchemaJavaReader jr, Services services, NamespaceSet nss, HashMap taclet2Builder)
      Used to construct Taclet parser
        KeYParser(ParserMode mode, TokenStream lexer, Services services)
      Although the parser mode can be deduced from the particular constructor used we still require the caller to provide the parser mode explicitly, so that the code is readable.

    • Constructor Detail

      • KeYParser

        public KeYParser(TokenStream input)

      • KeYParser

        public KeYParser(TokenStream input,
                 RecognizerSharedState state)

      • KeYParser

        public KeYParser(ParserMode mode,
                 TokenStream lexer,
                 Services services)
        Although the parser mode can be deduced from the particular constructor used we still require the caller to provide the parser mode explicitly, so that the code is readable.

      • KeYParser

        private KeYParser(TokenStream lexer,
                  Services services,
                  NamespaceSet nss,
                  ParserMode mode)

      • KeYParser

        public KeYParser(ParserMode mode,
                 TokenStream lexer,
                 JavaReader jr,
                 Services services,
                 NamespaceSet nss,
                 AbbrevMap scm)
        Used to construct Term parser - for first-order terms and formulae.

      • KeYParser

        public KeYParser(ParserMode mode,
                 TokenStream lexer,
                 Services services,
                 NamespaceSet nss)
        ONLY FOR TEST CASES. Used to construct Global Declaration Term parser - for first-order terms and formulae. Variables in quantifiers are expected to be declared globally in the variable namespace. This parser is used for test cases, where you want to know in advance which objects will represent bound variables.

      • KeYParser

        public KeYParser(ParserMode mode,
                 TokenStream lexer,
                 SchemaJavaReader jr,
                 Services services,
                 NamespaceSet nss,
                 HashMap taclet2Builder)
        Used to construct Taclet parser

      • KeYParser

        public KeYParser(ParserMode mode,
                 TokenStream lexer,
                 ParserConfig schemaConfig,
                 ParserConfig normalConfig,
                 HashMap taclet2Builder,
                 ImmutableList<Taclet> taclets)
        Used to construct Problem parser

      • lookupSort

        private Sort lookupSort(String name)
                 throws RecognitionException
        looks up and returns the sort of the given name or null if none has been found. If the sort is not found for the first time, the name is expanded with "java.lang." and the look up restarts
        Throws:
        RecognitionException

      • lookupVarfuncId

        private Operator lookupVarfuncId(String varfunc_name,
                                 Term[] args)
                          throws RecognitionException
        looks up a function, (program) variable or static query of the given name varfunc_id and the argument terms args in the namespaces and java info.
        Parameters:
        varfunc_name - the String with the symbols name
        args - is null iff no argument list is given, for instance `f', and is an array of size zero, if an empty argument list was given, for instance `f()'.
        Throws:
        RecognitionException
